subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Truth is the Word of God, upon which dependeth the education of those who are endowed with the power of understanding and of utterance
subcodes.first_line_orig: آفتاب حقیقی کلمه الهی است که تربیت اهل دیار معانی و بیان منوط باوست و اوست
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @fire and light; fire and water, @living waters; water of life, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @love as fire, @Manifestation of God as sun
